text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a stroll through a park on<n>my day off,
when...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HI-YAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I come across Yaeno Muteki<n>practicing martial
arts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're from the academy... Yes, this<n>training is
my daily routine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, my skills still pale in<n>comparison to
either of my masters...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I thought I could apply the ancient<n>martial arts
I've studied to racing as<n>well... I believed that if I
ran fast, I<n>could also punch faster...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I entered the academy for this reason,<n>but doing
so only opened my eyes to<n>just how far I have
yet to go.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My grandparents. They're masters<n>of the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What can I possibly do to come closer<n>to
reaching their level?
choice_data_list: You should focus on how quickly you can punch.

You should focus on how powerfully you can
punch.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I shall concentrate my efforts<n>on
increasing the speed of my strikes,<n>then.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will try it at once... HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Concentrating on the speed of<n>my punches
has made me realize I<n>need to improve my form.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though I am once again a<n>novice, seeing
things for the first time!<n>I shall continue this
exercise for a little<n>longer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki stoically continues<n>practicing her
punches.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I shall concentrate my efforts<n>on
increasing the strength of my<n>strikes, then.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will try it at once... HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Concentrating on the force of my<n>punches
has made me realize how<n>much energy each
strike consumes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, that is exactly the point of<n>training. I
feel all the more motivated to<n>continue now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki stoically continues<n>practicing her
punches.
